message:
fix(simulate): account for ellipsis in exemplar truncation

The truncation logic in RuleStatsBuilder::add_match was not accounting
for the "..." suffix (3 chars), causing truncated strings to exceed
the configured max_exemplar_command_len. This fix matches the behavior
of truncate_command_for_display in cli.rs.

Added test: exemplar_truncation_respects_max_len

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
